identity.name: SecureBridge
identity.description: A minimalist, high-end secure messaging portal focusing on trust, clarity, and speed.
principles: Radical Simplicity: If it's not essential, remove it.
Trust through Clarity: White space and clean typography build confidence.
Speed is a Feature: Interactions should feel instant.
Secure by Design: Visual cues (lock icons, badges) constantly reassure the user.

font_family.mono: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, monospace

buttons.primary: bg-[#2563EB] hover:bg-[#1D4ED8] text-white shadow-sm hover:shadow transition-all duration-200 font-medium px-6 py-2.5 rounded-lg active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-white border border-gray-200 text-slate-700 hover:bg-gray-50 hover:text-slate-900 transition-colors font-medium px-4 py-2 rounded-lg
buttons.ghost: bg-transparent hover:bg-gray-100 text-slate-600 hover:text-slate-900 transition-colors px-3 py-2 rounded-md

cards.base: bg-white border border-gray-100 rounded-xl shadow-[0_2px_8px_rgba(0,0,0,0.04)] p-6 md:p-8

inputs.base: flex h-11 w-full rounded-lg border border-gray-200 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-white file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-gray-400 focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-[#2563EB] focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50 transition-all

badges.secure: inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 rounded-full bg-blue-50 px-3 py-1 text-xs font-medium text-blue-700 ring-1 ring-inset ring-blue-700/10

detail_view.card: bg-white rounded-2xl border border-gray-100 shadow-sm overflow-hidden
detail_view.header: bg-gray-50/50 border-b border-gray-100 px-6 py-4 flex items-center justify-between

send_form.container: max-w-md mx-auto px-4 py-20 flex flex-col justify-center min-h-[80vh]

visual_enhancers.shadows: Use extremely subtle shadows. The 'Clean & Quiet' look relies on borders and whitespace more than heavy drop shadows.
visual_enhancers.borders: Use 'border-gray-100' for almost everything. It should be barely visible, just enough to define structure.
visual_enhancers.whitespace: Be generous. Use 'py-12', 'py-20', 'gap-8'. Don't cram content.
visual_enhancers.icons: Use Lucide React icons. Stroke width 1.5px or 2px. Keep them small and elegant.

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement the 'Send Message' flow at '/api/send' (backend) and '/' (frontend send form).
Implement the 'Message Detail' flow at '/inbox/:id' (frontend detail).
Use the 'Clean & Quiet' palette strictly. No dark mode for this POC (unless toggled, but default to light).
Ensure the 'Secure Connection' badge is visible on the detail view.
Use 'sonner' for toast notifications (e.g., 'Message sent securely').
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Do not use generic centered layouts without purpose.
Create depth through subtle borders and very light shadows.
